notes: v0.13.0 — PLAY hub rebuilt as Hero Stack: huge featured PRACTICE panel (2/3 width, cinematic diagonal gradient, corner brackets, big title, scanline overlay, ▶ ENTER PRACTICE chip) with BOSS RUSH stacked over MULTIPLAYER on the right column.
